items.original_text: AI should dramatically increase quality of life and individual freedoms for people around the world. The OpenAI Foundation is making an initial $250M commitment to measurement, transition support, and new approaches to broadly shared prosperity. http://openaifoundation.org/news/economic-futures-in-the-age-of-ai
items.zh_text: AI 应大幅提升全球人民的生活质量和个人自由。OpenAI 基金会初步承诺投入 2.5 亿美元，用于衡量、转型支持以及探索实现广泛共享繁荣的新路径。http://openaifoundation.org/news/economic-futures-in-the-age-of-ai

items.original_text: 🛫 Hermeus: Supersonic. Mach 1.21. Quarterhorse Mk 2.1 is now the world’s first privately developed, unmanned supersonic jet and the fastest unmanned aircraft flying today. This flight makes Hermeus the fastest company in aviation history to go from founding to supersonic flight - exactly
items.zh_text: 🛫 Hermeus：超音速。马赫1.21。Quarterhorse Mk 2.1 现在是全球首架由私人研发的无人超音速喷气机，也是目前飞行速度最快的无人飞行器。此次飞行使 Hermeus 成为航空史上从创立到实现超音速飞行速度最快的公司。

items.original_text: RT Jeff Bezos Re @NASAMoonBase is the stepping stone towards everything that comes next. NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman: The near impossible is becoming possible. We are building toward a sustained human presence at the lunar South Pole. It begins with Phase 1: CLPS landers and LTV rovers testing the “science of survival” on the lunar surface before heavy HLS cargo landers deliver the mass and
items.zh_text: 转发 Jeff Bezos 回复 @NASAMoonBase 是通往未来一切的垫脚石。NASA 局长 Jared Isaacman：近乎不可能正在变为可能。我们正在朝着在月球南极建立持续的人类存在迈进。这一切从第一阶段开始：CLPS 着陆器和 LTV 月球车在重型 HLS 货运着陆器运送物资之前，测试月球表面的“生存科学”。

items.original_text: RT WY Been using Grok Build these past few days, and the thing that really got me hooked is Imagine and Imagine Video. I built a full dinosaur encyclopedia site — every image, every video clip on it, all generated by Grok itself. One prompt: "build a dinosaur encyclopedia site, generate matching images and videos, add them in" — visuals, video, copy, layout, the whole thing done in one flow. No jumping between a dozen tools. It's perfect for building science and education sites for kids — dinosaurs, space, animals, history, geography… Grok generates vivid visuals and videos that make knowledge way easier to grasp, more visual, more fun. xAI: Grok Build is now available in Beta for all SuperGrok and X Premium+ users. Use Plan Mode, create images and videos with Imagine, and build automations or orchestrators with the CLI. Visit http://x.ai/cli to get started.
items.zh_text: RT WY 过去几天一直在用 Grok Build，真正让我着迷的是 Imagine 和 Imagine Video。我搭建了一个完整的恐龙百科全书网站——上面的每一张图片、每一段视频，全部由 Grok 自己生成。只需一个提示词：“构建一个恐龙百科全书网站，生成匹配的图片和视频，并添加进去”——视觉、视频、文案、布局，整个流程一气呵成。无需在十几个工具之间来回切换。它非常适合为孩子们搭建科学和教育网站——恐龙、太空、动物、历史、地理……Grok 生成的生动视觉和视频让知识更容易理解，更直观，更有趣。xAI：Grok Build 现已面向所有 SuperGrok 和 X Premium+ 用户推出 Beta 版。使用 Plan Mode，通过 Imagine 创建图片和视频，并通过 CLI 构建自动化或编排器。访问 http://x.ai/cli 开始使用。

So we wrote a guide on how to use Codex for knowledge work as well as we do. You dont want to miss this one... https://every.to/guides/codex-for-knowledge-work

items.original_text: RT Mojtaba Seyedhosseini Gemini Embedding 2: A Native Multimodal Embedding Model from Gemini 🚀 Today, we’re sharing the @GoogleDeepMind white paper for GE 2, our first native multimodal embedding model. Whether it’s text, audio, video, or image, GE 2 provides a unified representation of the input.
items.zh_text: 转推 Mojtaba Seyedhosseini：Gemini Embedding 2：来自 Gemini 的原生多模态嵌入模型 🚀 今天，我们分享 @Google DeepMind 关于 GE 2 的白皮书，这是我们首个原生多模态嵌入模型。无论是文本、音频、视频还是图像，GE 2 都能提供统一的输入表示。

items.original_text: RT Roshan Rao Announcing ESMFold2, our new state-of-the-art structure prediction model capable of predicting structure from single sequences or MSAs. ESMFold2 improves on benchmarks of protein-protein interaction and is particularly strong on predictions of antibody-antigen complexes. Alex Rives: Today we're announcing ESMFold2, an open scientific engine to power prediction, design, and discovery across protein biology. The new model delivers state of the art performance on protein interactions, especially antibodies, a critical modality for therapeutics. We have
items.zh_text: 转 Roshan Rao：宣布 ESMFold2，我们最新的最先进结构预测模型，能够从单序列或多序列比对预测结构。ESMFold2 在蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用基准上有所改进，在抗体-抗原复合物的预测方面尤其强大。Alex Rives：今天我们宣布 ESMFold2，一个开放的科学引擎，用于推动蛋白质生物学领域的预测、设计和发现。新模型在蛋白质相互作用（尤其是抗体，一种关键的治疗模式）上实现了最先进的性能。

items.original_text: RT Randall Balestriero It is refreshing to have some new arguments pointing at specific distributions (Gaussian) our embeddings must follow! Especially now that we know how to do scalable distribution matching in high dimension with LeJEPA/SIGReg! Another win for Abraham de Moivre and Friedrich Gauss! David Klindt: What does JEPA actually learn? We can finally prove it 🌍 So excited to share our theory of identifiable World Models: LeJEPA recovers the latent variables of the world. Plan in the learned World Model as if it were real, same shortest path. 📄: http://klindtlab.github.io/lejepa-identifiability
items.zh_text: 转发 Randall Balestriero：看到一些关于我们的嵌入必须遵循特定分布（高斯分布）的新论点，真是令人耳目一新！尤其是现在我们知道如何通过 LeJEPA/SIGReg 在高维空间中进行可扩展的分布匹配！这是 Abraham de Moivre 和 Friedrich Gauss 的又一次胜利！David Klindt：JEPA 到底学到了什么？我们终于可以证明它 🌍 非常兴奋地分享我们关于可识别世界模型的理论：LeJEPA 恢复了世界的潜在变量。在学到的世界模型中进行规划，就像它是真实的一样，同样的最短路径。📄：http://klindtlab.github.io/lejepa-identifiability

items.original_text: RT Alex Rives Today we're announcing ESMFold2, an open scientific engine to power prediction, design, and discovery across protein biology. The new model delivers state of the art performance on protein interactions, especially antibodies, a critical modality for therapeutics. We have designed and validated miniprotein binders and single chain antibodies across five therapeutic targets that are important in cancer and immunology. We are seeing very high success rates, and affinities at levels consistent with therapeutic activity. We’re also releasing an atlas of 6.8 billion proteins, and 1.1 billion predicted structures. ESMFold2 is built on a state of the art language model that has been trained on billions of protein sequences. A world model of protein biology emerges through language modeling. We’ve used the techniques of mechanistic interpretability developed to understand large language models to understand the concepts ESM uses to represent proteins. The model’s representation space has a compositional organization of features across scales, levels of complexity, and abstraction, that reflects and mirrors the understanding of protein biology developed through a century of empirical science. This understanding emerges without prior knowledge, just from language modeling of protein sequences. Language models are becoming a powerful substrate to understand and program biology. The design of protein interactions is one of the most fundamental problems in biophysics, and has critical implications for the discovery of new medicines. A simple gradient based search with the model was able to discover high-affinity protein binders. I'm excited by the potential this has to accelerate basic science and the understanding of proteins. And especially for the new avenues it opens up for therapeutic design and medicine.
items.zh_text: RT Alex Rives 今天我们宣布推出ESMFold2，这是一个开放的科学引擎，用于推动蛋白质生物学领域的预测、设计和发现。新模型在蛋白质相互作用方面达到了最先进的性能，尤其是抗体这一对治疗至关重要的模态。我们针对癌症和免疫学中重要的五个治疗靶点，设计并验证了微型蛋白结合剂和单链抗体。我们看到了非常高的成功率，以及达到治疗活性水平的亲和力。我们还发布了一个包含68亿个蛋白质和11亿个预测结构的图谱。ESMFold2基于一个最先进的语言模型构建，该模型已在数十亿个蛋白质序列上进行了训练。通过语言建模，一个蛋白质生物学的世界模型得以涌现。我们利用为理解大型语言模型而开发的机械可解释性技术，来理解ESMFold用于表示蛋白质的概念。该模型的表示空间具有跨尺度、复杂性和抽象层次的特征组合组织，反映并镜像了通过一个世纪的实证科学所发展的蛋白质生物学理解。这种理解无需先验知识，仅通过蛋白质序列的语言建模就能涌现。语言模型正成为理解和编程生物学的强大基础。蛋白质相互作用的设计是生物物理学中最基本的问题之一，对新药发现具有关键意义。利用该模型进行简单的基于梯度的搜索，就能发现高亲和力的蛋白质结合剂。我对这一潜力感到兴奋，它有望加速基础科学和对蛋白质的理解，尤其为治疗设计和医学开辟了新的途径。

items.original_text: New on the Engineering Blog: The access and permissions we grant agents should evolve with their capabilities. In our own products, we set these parameters through sandboxing, which limits the scope of any potentially destructive actions. Read more: https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/how-we-contain-claude
items.zh_text: 工程博客新文章：我们授予智能体的访问和权限应随其能力的发展而演进。在我们自己的产品中，我们通过沙盒机制设置这些参数，从而限制任何潜在破坏性行为的范围。阅读更多：https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/how-we-contain-claude

items.original_text: RT Pushmeet Kohli AI agents are advancing research-level math. 🚀 I’m thrilled to share @GoogleDeepMind’s AlphaProof Nexus - an agentic framework for formal proof search powered by Gemini. When applied to a set of open formal math problems, our agent autonomously solved: ✅ 9 open Erdős problems (including two open for 56 years!) ✅ 44 Online Encyclopedia of Integer Sequences (OEIS) problems ✅ A 15-year-old open problem in algebraic geometry ✅ A 7-year-old open question in min-max optimization We are collaborating with mathematicians across disciplines - from combinatorics and graph theory to quantum optics. Ultimately, these results show the massive potential of even simple agentic loops powered by Gemini. Read the paper here: https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22763v1
items.zh_text: 谷歌DeepMind：转推 Pushmeet Kohli：AI智能体正在推进研究级数学。🚀 我很激动地分享@GoogleDeepMind的AlphaProof Nexus——一个由Gemini驱动的形式化证明搜索智能体框架。当应用于一组开放的形式化数学问题时，我们的智能体自主解决了：✅ 9个开放的Erdős问题（包括两个已开放56年的问题！）✅ 44个在线整数序列百科全书（OEIS）问题 ✅ 一个存在15年之久的代数几何开放问题 ✅ 一个存在7年之久的极小极大优化开放问题 我们正在与跨学科的数学家合作——从组合学和图论到量子光学。最终，这些结果展示了即使是由Gemini驱动的简单智能体循环也具有巨大潜力。在此阅读论文：https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22763v1

items.original_text: Introducing OpenAI Guaranteed Capacity: a new offering that enables customers to guarantee long-term access to OpenAI compute. We’ve made long-term investments in infrastructure, partnerships, and capacity planning to help customers scale reliably. Now, Guaranteed Capacity helps customers plan ahead for critical workloads in a compute-constrained world. http://openai.com/guaranteed-capacity
items.zh_text: OpenAI 推出保障容量服务：一项新服务，让客户能够确保长期使用 OpenAI 计算资源。我们在基础设施、合作伙伴关系和容量规划方面进行了长期投资，以帮助客户可靠地扩展。现在，保障容量服务帮助客户在计算资源受限的世界中提前规划关键工作负载。

items.original_text: We’re adding new ways for people to identify AI-generated images and understand where they came from. In addition to C2PA Content Credentials, images now also contain a SynthID watermark, and can be identified using a public verification tool to check whether an image was made by OpenAI products. https://openai.com/index/advancing-content-provenance/
items.zh_text: 我们正在增加新的方式，让人们识别AI生成的图像并了解其来源。除了C2PA内容凭证外，图像现在还包含SynthID水印，并且可以使用公开验证工具来检查图像是否由OpenAI产品生成。

Read more about how we’re widening the conversation on frontier AI: https://www.anthropic.com/news/widening-conversation-ai
items.zh_text: 过去几个月里，我们一直在与学者、哲学家、神职人员和伦理学家就人工智能引发的问题进行对话——从良好品格如何形成开始。了解更多关于我们如何拓宽前沿人工智能对话的信息：https://www.anthropic.com/news/widening-conversation-ai

items.original_text: This works really well btw, at the end of your query ask your LLM to "structure your response as HTML", then view the generated file in your browser. I've also had some success asking the LLM to present its output as slideshows, etc. More generally, imo audio is the human-preferred input to AIs but vision (images/animations/video) is the preferred output from them. Around a ~third of our brains are a massively parallel processor dedicated to vision, it is the 10-lane superhighway of information into brain. As AI improves, I think we'll see a progression that takes advantage: 1) raw text (hard/effortful to read) 2) markdown (bold, italic, headings, tables, a bit easier on the eyes) <-- current default 3) HTML (still procedural with underlying code, but a lot more flexibility on the graphics, layout, even interactivity) <-- early but forming new good default ...4,5,6,... n) interactive neural videos/simulations Imo the extrapolation (though the technology doesn't exist just yet) ends in some kind of interactive videos generated directly by a diffusion neural net. Many open questions as to how exact/procedural "Software 1.0" artifacts (e.g. interactive simulations) may be woven together with neural artifacts (diffusion grids), but generally something in the direction of the recently viral https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444 There are also improvements necessary and pending at the input. Audio nor text nor video alone are not enough, e.g. I feel a need to point/gesture to things on the screen, similar to all the things you would do with a person physically next to you and your computer screen. TLDR The input/output mind meld between humans and AIs is ongoing and there is a lot of work to do and significant progress to be made, way before jumping all the way into neuralink-esque BCIs and all that. For what's worth exploring at the current stage, hot tip try ask for HTML. Thariq: http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848
items.zh_text: 顺便说一句，这个方法效果很好：在提问结束时，让你的大语言模型“以 HTML 格式组织回答”，然后在浏览器中查看生成的文件。我还曾成功让大语言模型以幻灯片等形式呈现输出。更广泛地说，在我看来，音频是人类偏好的 AI 输入方式，而视觉（图像/动画/视频）则是偏好的输出方式。我们大脑中大约三分之一的部分是一个专门处理视觉的大规模并行处理器，它是信息进入大脑的 10 车道高速公路。随着 AI 的进步，我认为我们会看到一系列利用这一优势的演进：1) 纯文本（阅读起来费力/费劲）2) Markdown（粗体、斜体、标题、表格，对眼睛稍微友好一些）<-- 当前默认 3) HTML（仍然有底层代码的过程性，但在图形、布局甚至交互性上灵活得多）<-- 早期但正在形成新的良好默认值 ...4,5,6,... n) 交互式神经视频/模拟。我认为外推（尽管技术尚未存在）最终会走向由扩散神经网络直接生成的某种交互式视频。关于“软件 1.0”制品（例如交互式模拟）如何与神经制品（扩散网格）精确/过程性地融合，还有许多悬而未决的问题，但总体方向类似于最近爆火的 https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444。输入方面也有必要且待进行的改进。仅音频、文本或视频都不够，例如，我觉得需要指向/手势屏幕上的内容，就像你和真人一起在电脑屏幕前做的那样。简而言之，人类与 AI 之间的输入/输出思维融合正在进行中，还有很多工作要做，并且需要取得重大进展，远在直接跳到 Neuralink 式的脑机接口等之前。就当前阶段值得探索的内容而言，一个小窍门是尝试要求 HTML。Thariq: http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848
items.media_note: 该动态可能包含 X 原生媒体，当前 RSS 未提供视频文件，请打开原帖观看。

items.original_text: This is the the quote I've been citing a lot recently. kache: you can outsource your thinking but you cannot outsource your understanding
items.zh_text: 这是我最近经常引用的一句话。kache：你可以外包你的思考，但你不能外包你的理解。
